Warning: [Upgrade] Suppress this message by setting 'DefaultBuildSettings = BuildSettingsVersion.V6;' in SandboxEditor.Target.cs, and explicitly overriding settings that differ from the new defaults.
Wrote partial receipt to /Users/dev/Documents/claude-unreal/sandbox-project/Binaries/Mac/SandboxEditor.target
SandboxEditor modifies the values of properties: [ UndefinedIdentifierWarningLevel: Off != Error ]. This is not allowed, as SandboxEditor has build products in common with UnrealEditor.
Remove the modified setting, change SandboxEditor to use a unique build environment by setting 'BuildEnvironment = TargetBuildEnvironment.Unique;' in the SandboxEditorTarget constructor, or set bOverrideBuildEnvironment = true to force this setting on.

Result: Failed (OtherCompilationError)
